description_long: This is a modern tactical shotgun with a sleek, predominantly black finish and a compact, bullpup-style design. The receiver and barrel assembly are integrated into a single streamlined unit, with a prominent top-mounted optical sight for improved aiming. The shotgun features a pistol grip and a trigger guard that is rounded and slightly elongated, providing ergonomic handling. The fore-end appears to have a pump-action mechanism, with a ribbed texture for secure grip. The barrel is relatively short and robust, with no visible venting or ribbing along its length. The overall construction suggests a focus on maneuverability and tactical use in urban environments.
description: A compact, black tactical shotgun with a bullpup design, pistol grip, and top-mounted optic. Features a pump-action fore-end and a rounded, elongated trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the pistol grip, pump fore-end, and mounted optic.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, optic alignment, and the compact width of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the grip and fore-end.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock, optic, and the overall narrow profile of the shotgun.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, short tactical barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded and elongated trigger guard, moderately sized, with smooth contours
